use_cases: Button element with multiple visual variants for different action contexts
Accessible button with focus-visible ring states and disabled handling
Composable button that renders as child element via Radix Slot
Standard action trigger for forms, dialogs, and navigation
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with CVA (class-variance-authority) supporting six style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options. Features standard accessibility patterns including focus-visible rings, disabled states, and keyboard navigation support. Uses Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, allowing rendering as child elements. Styled with Tailwind CSS for lightweight, utility-first implementation.
